tracks.rawText: 2:47Bajo en la Víav5.5CoverBrazilian funk and phonk fusion at 130 BPM in G minor, driven by a melody-first chorus hook on high-pitched cowbell, gritty lo-fi synth haze, clipped kick, sharp punchy snare, and distorted syncopated 808 bass, Shouted male vocals are heavily compressed and saturated, with bass-drop hits and chopped vocal stabs punching the pocket2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:35Studio Selectionv5.5CoverBold rap with brash trumpet fanfares, muted brass stabs, and punchy trombone accents over a hard 808 sub-bass, crisp snare, and tight hi-hat rolls, Dry lead rap vocals sit upfront with call-and-response ad-libs, while jazzy brass harmonies and sidechained synth bass add grit and swagger2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:41Desde las Cincov5.5Boom-bap rap consciente with dusty jazz-piano stabs, upright bass, crisp rimshot snare, and swung 16th hi-hats, Tape hiss, vinyl crackle, and chopped soul samples frame tight, front-facing verses; sparse breakdowns, then layered backup vocals, horn accents, and denser percussion words build the momentum3PublishRemix
tracks.title: Desde las Cinco

tracks.title: Desde las Cinco

tracks.rawText: 2:42Calle y Sombrav5.5West Coast rap with laid-back swung bounce, finger-snapped drums, rubbery bass, wah guitar licks, and a slow head-nod groove; verse rides sparse with playful internal rhymes, pre-chorus lifts with backing chants and rising keys, chorus lands wide with gang vocal repeats and a sticky call-and-response hook, Lead vocal stays cool and relaxed with doubled punchlines, ad-lib echoes, tape-delay throws on the last word of hook lines, and a few turntable scratches into transitions, Ear candy includes vinyl crackle between sections, a short whistle riser into the chorus, and a filtered synth swell before the bridge, Mix is warm, crisp, and glossy, with a smoky low-end pocket and bright top-end shimmer2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Calle y Sombra

tracks.rawText: 3:00Bajo en la Víav5.5G-funk hip-hop with a laid-back west coast bounce, swung drums, elastic bassline, wah-guitar stabs, and a relaxed pocket; verse rides sparse kick-snare and rubbery bass, pre-chorus adds claps and filtered synth glow, chorus hits with stacked gang vocals and short echo throws on the anchor phrase, Smooth close-mic male vocal, lazy double-tracked hooks, ad-libs drifting at line ends, tape hiss and vinyl crackle between sections, bright punchy mix with a warm low-end roll2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Bajo en la Vía

tracks.rawText: 1:30Bitumen Pulsev5.5Dark trap rap beat, 88 BPM, heavy punchy kick, layered snare clap, fast hi-hat rolls with humanized timing, deep 808 bass with glide and distortion, minor key piano melody with dark cinematic strings, subtle vinyl texture, atmospheric pads, aggressive urban mood, modern trap production, clean mix, wide stereo, professional mastering2PublishRemix
tracks.title: Bitumen Pulse
